notes: Fortinet is a cybersecurity company specializing in network security appliances, particularly firewalls. FortiGate is one of the most deployed enterprise firewalls globally. Key products: FortiGate (next-gen firewalls), FortiOS (device operating system), FortiManager (centralized management), FortiAnalyzer (logging/analytics), FortiClient (endpoint protection). Fortinet devices sit at network boundaries with access to internal networks, making vulnerabilities high-value targets for nation-state actors, ransomware operators, and initial access brokers. Critical FortiOS vulnerabilities frequently appear in CISA KEV. Fortinet is a CNA. SSL-VPN vulnerabilities are particularly high-risk because they are internet-exposed. FortiGuard Labs publishes threat research alongside PSIRT advisories.

data.description: Fortinet's PSIRT advisories covering FortiOS, FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer, and other Fortinet products.
data.notes: Advisory IDs use FG-IR-YY-NNN format: two-digit year and three-digit sequential number. Covers all Fortinet products. Fortinet products are high-value targets; advisories are often critical severity. FortiGuard Labs publishes threat research alongside PSIRT advisories.
